  "claims": [
    "East Palo Alto has the lowest vaccination rate at just 24 percent.",
    "Atherton has the highest vaccination rate at 75 percent despite only 33 percent of its population being priority eligible.",
    "Essential frontline workers in communities like East Palo Alto remain largely unvaccinated.",
